55:
Her understanding of our trade is unsurpassed, and her flair for prospecting uncanny. Her brain, in short, is a veritable <Emphasis>gold mine</Emphasis> of knowledge─much of it concerning the mining of gold.
...Ha ha! Jesting apart, you stand to learn a great deal from her.
